titles.text: Click Manga: Opera Za no Kaijin
クリックまんが オペラ座の怪人

descriptions.text: Click Manga: Opera Za no Kaijin is a interactive comic game based on the The Phantom of the Opera novel in which the player can make advance the comic story clicking in it. The gameplay is that the player has to solve some puzzles or click with the pointer in a comic book scene to advance to the next scene.
The story is based on The Phantom of the Opera.
